title: ResultSet
description: The result set returned from a successfully executed SQL statement, including metadata, row data, and execution statistics.

statementHandle.description: Handle that uniquely identifies the executed statement.

createdOn.description: Timestamp that specifies when the statement execution started. The timestamp is expressed in milliseconds since the epoch.

statementStatusUrl.description: URL for checking the status of the statement.

data.description: Result set data. Each element in the outer array represents a row. Each element in the inner array represents a column value as a string.
